revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-335

A discharge lamp of tubular form either straight or curved.


Note: In German usage, such a discharge lamp is called Leuchtroehre if it contains no luminescent material and operates at high voltage (up to about 6,000 volts).

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
